title: Norman, OK — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Norman, OK: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Norman is a city in OK with a population of 128,000. Home of the University of Oklahoma with a vibrant college town and the National Weather Center.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
